decision.next_action: STABLE達成。次回: Issue #238 Next.js 14→16 / React 18→19 段階移行（高リスク・専用セッション推奨）。Issue #239 (vitest部分) close可能。

learning.last_failure_pattern: @vitest/coverage-v8 peer dependency: v4.x requires vitest@4, must pin to v1.6.1 to match vitest@1.6.1
learning.improvement_notes: 1) vitest coverage include pattern needed to avoid Next.js source map errors. 2) PR branch rebased onto main triggers CI; first PR creation may not trigger if branch is far behind. 3) Use git stash + rebase + force-push to resolve conflicts and trigger CI. 4) Current coverage: Statements 8%, Branches 48.9%, Functions 23.6%. 5) auth-context.tsx tests: need vi.mock('next/navigation'), localStorage mock, global.fetch mock. 6) git add path issue in subdirectory: use git -C /repo/root add instead.
